ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicle_population" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data recorded */,
  "two_wheelers_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of two-wheelers in the total vehicle population */,
  "cars_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of cars, jeeps & taxis in the total vehicle population */,
  "buses_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of buses in the total vehicle population */,
  "goods_vehicles_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of goods vehicles in the total vehicle population */,
  "other_vehicles_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of other vehicles in the total vehicle population */,
  "total_million" REAL /* Total vehicle population in millions */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the area */,
  "environmental_impact_score" REAL /* Environmental impact score of the vehicle population */,
  "safety_index" REAL /* Safety index based on vehicle accidents and incidents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle type (e.g., Two Wheelers, Cars, Buses) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle type */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Fuel type of the vehicle (e.g., gasoline, diesel, electric) */,
  "emission_class" TEXT /* Emission class of the vehicle */,
  "average_mileage" REAL /* Average mileage of the vehicle type */,
  "seating_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the vehicle type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annual_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annual report */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the report corresponds to */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the findings in the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the report document */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, finalized, published) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the report */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annual_reports_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES vehicle_population ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used by the user */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_growth_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year for the trend observation */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year for the trend observation */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Average growth rate (%) during the period */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trend and its implications */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "economic_indicator" REAL /* Economic indicators that might influence vehicle growth */,
  "social_indicator" REAL /* Social indicators that might influence vehicle growth */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_growth_trends_start_year FOREIGN KEY ("start_year") REFERENCES vehicle_population ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the recommendation is made for */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Text of the recommendation */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Predicted impact of the recommendation */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "cost_estimate" REAL /* Estimated cost of implementing the recommendation */,
  "benefit_estimate" REAL /* Estimated benefits of implementing the recommendation */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the recommendation (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_recommendations_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES vehicle_population ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographic region */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of the geographic region (e.g., city, state, country) */,
  "parent_region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent geographic region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)
